name: Test Mod v2.0.0
body:
QA cassette fixture — represents the 'latest release' GitHub returns when the manager asks about qa-fixture/test-mod. The on-disk installed mod is at v1.0.0, so this drives a 'needs update' row through both check_all_updates and audit_mod_versions.

Captured: synthesized 2026-05-12 against the GitHubRelease schema in src-tauri/src/download.rs. Update-version bumps to this file should change tag_name AND the asset name to match.
